title: (Bullish Signal) HEES, enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Nov 05, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that HEES's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron A.I.dvisor backtested 79 similar cases where HEES's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 67 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $22.58 crossed the support line at $21.44 and is trading between $31.36 resistance and $21.44 support lines. Throughout the month of 10/06/20 - 11/05/20, the price experienced a +0.04% Uptrend. During the week of 10/29/20 - 11/05/20, the stock enjoyed a +9% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/pi75ee2v1ox51.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=003b41a7d689042a863522bf7e66cd4d035ce213

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

HEES moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 02, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for HEES crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 06, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 13 of 17 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

The 50-day Moving Average for HEES moved above the 200-day moving average on October 05, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +10.74% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where HEES advanced for three days, in 254 of 318 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

HEES may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 178 of 229 cases where HEES Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 78%.
